description: CompositionRed and navy blue checked shirt made of 100% cotton, has a front buttoned placket and frill detailing, mildly puffed short sleeves with smocked hems and has a curved hemline FittingComfortWash careHand wash in cold waterDo not machine washWash dark colours separatelyUse mild detergentDo not bleachDo not wringDo not tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild ironDo not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryDesigned for that casual feminine look, this checked shirt from jealous 21 looks all the more stylish with the smocked sleeve hems and unbuttoned collar. The fabric buttons along the placket and elasticated side ends add to the smart look. Team this with jeans or skirts and ballerina flats or floaters for a cool casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight: 5'7"; Chest: 33"; Waist: 25"
